svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="ページ-1" id="SLcqDqBbQEObeRvvdZaq"> <mxGraphModel dx="343" dy="1680" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="studio" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="Studio（スタジオ）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="180" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="studio_a" parent="studio" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="- studioId: StudioId
- name: String
- address: Address" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="room" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="Room（部屋）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="180" x="280" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="room_a" parent="room" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="- roomId: RoomId
- name: String
- capacity: Int
- hourlyRate: Money" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="180" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="equipment" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="Equipment（機材）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="180" x="520" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="equipment_a" parent="equipment" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="- equipmentId: EquipmentId
- name: String
- rentalFee: Money" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cancel_policy" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="CancellationPolicy（キャンセルポリシー）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="40" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cancel_policy_a" parent="cancel_policy" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="- policyId: PolicyId
- rules: CancellationRule[]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cancel_rule" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=2;html=1;" value="«value object» CancellationRule" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="40" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cancel_rule_a" parent="cancel_rule" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="- daysBeforeBooking: Int
- refundRate: Percentage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="member" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="Member（メンバー）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="190" x="760" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="member_a" parent="member" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="- memberId: MemberId
- name: String
- email: Email" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="member_card" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="MemberCard（会員カード）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="190" x="760" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="member_card_a" parent="member_card" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="- cardId: CardId
- cardNumber: String
- points: Point
- issuedAt: DateTime" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="band" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="Band（バンド）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="760" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="band_a" parent="band" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="- bandId: BandId
- name: String" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="190" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="booking" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;html=1;" value="★ Booking（予約）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="220" x="310" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="booking_a" parent="booking" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="- bookingId: BookingId
- status: BookingStatus
- timeSlot: TimeSlot
- totalAmount: Money
- createdAt: DateTime" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="220" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="timeslot" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=2;html=1;" value="«value object» TimeSlot（時間枠）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="310" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="timeslot_a" parent="timeslot" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="- startTime: DateTime
- endTime: DateTime" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="190" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="payment" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="Payment（支払い）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="220" x="40" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="payment_a" parent="payment" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="- paymentId: PaymentId
- amount: Money
- method: PaymentMethod
- pointsUsed: Point
- status: PaymentStatus
- paidAt: DateTime" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="extension" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="ExtensionRequest（延長リクエスト）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="220" x="530" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="extension_a" parent="extension" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="- requestId: RequestId
- extraMinutes: Int
- status: ExtensionStatus
- requestedAt: DateTime" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="booking_status" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=2;html=1;" value="«enumeration» BookingStatus" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="170" x="560" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="booking_status_a" parent="booking_status" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="TENTATIVE（仮押さえ）
AWAITING_PAYMENT
CONFIRMED（確定）
CHECKED_IN
IN_USE（利用中）
COMPLETED（完了）
CANCELLED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="170" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="payment_method" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=2;html=1;" value="«enumeration» PaymentMethod" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="180" x="40" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="payment_method_a" parent="payment_method" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="ONLINE_CREDIT_CARD
ON_SITE_CASH
ON_SITE_CARD" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="point_vo" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=2;html=1;" value="«value object» Point" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="280" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="point_vo_a" parent="point_vo" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;" value="- value: Int
(1P = 1円)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" edge="1" parent="1" source="studio" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=ERmany;startArrow=ERone;startFill=0;endFill=0;" target="room" value="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" edge="1" parent="1" source="room" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=ERmany;startArrow=ERone;startFill=0;endFill=0;" target="equipment" value="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" edge="1" parent="1" source="studio" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=ERone;startArrow=ERone;startFill=0;endFill=0;" target="cancel_policy" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r4" edge="1" parent="1" source="cancel_policy" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=ERmany;startArrow=ERone;startFill=0;endFill=0;" target="cancel_rule" value="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r5" edge="1" parent="1" source="member" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=ERone;startArrow=ERone;startFill=0;endFill=0;" target="member_card" value="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="950" y="450" /> <mxPoint x="950" y="110" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r7" edge="1" parent="1" source="booking" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=ERone;startArrow=ERmany;startFill=0;endFill=0;" target="member" value="予約者"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> - amount: Money
- method: PaymentMethod
- pointsUsed: Point
- status: PaymentStatus
- paidAt: DateTime
